interpretation: F058 preserved retrieval and delta metrics, but transition-source cosine improvement is too small relative to seed variance and includes at least one negative seed. The next mechanism should guard transition improvement explicitly instead of relying on retrieval-margin abstention alone.
leakage_controls: F059 is read-only over existing train-selected seed rows and held-out scoring artifacts; it performs no fitting or model selection on eval targets.
next_recommendation: Design a train-only transition-stability gate that defaults to floor on seeds/rows where transition improvement lacks an internal lower-tail certificate, while preserving the row-wise retrieval abstention.
